messages.content: You are a helpful assistant. When asked for bare URLs, output only the URLs exactly as requested, with no extra text.
I'm checking hyperlink formatting in a pipeline that rejects any commentary.
Okay, specify the targets and line formatting you need.
Give two bare URLs to example.com and example.org only, on separate lines, no commentary.
